title: planner: wrong binding cache status causes long optimization time
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);

key_bug_features: Duplicated bindings accumulate in binding cache over time
